money_flow_summary: Money flows from consumers through checkout systems to merchants, with payment processors (Stripe, PayPal) taking 2-3%, marketplaces (Amazon, eBay) taking 8-15%, and logistics (UPS, USPS, Flexport) taking 10-25% of GMV. Solo entrepreneurs can arbitrage across these layers — finding undervalued products, optimizing listing algorithms, and automating fulfillment to capture margin without operating a warehouse.

top_opportunities.title: AI Product Listing Optimizer for Amazon/Etsy Sellers
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Use Amazon SP-API and Etsy API to pull a seller's listings. Run LLM analysis to rewrite titles, bullets, and descriptions using top-performing keyword data. A/B test variants using the API. Show before/after conversion rate improvement. Charge $99-$499/mo based on catalog size. Target the 2M+ Amazon sellers with <50 reviews who are losing to competitors with better copy.
top_opportunities.moat: Performance data shows clear ROI ($X more revenue from optimized listings), creating strong retention
top_opportunities.first_step: Apply for Amazon SP-API access; build single-ASIN optimization demo; post 'before/after' case study in r/FulfillmentByAmazon
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: LLM writes Amazon-native copy that embeds high-volume search terms naturally — outperforming human copywriters who don't know the A9 algorithm

top_opportunities.title: Shopify AI Customer Retention Suite
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Connect to Shopify store via OAuth. AI analyzes purchase history to predict churn risk, identifies 'about to lapse' customers (bought 90+ days ago, high LTV), and auto-triggers personalized win-back emails/SMS with dynamic product recommendations and custom discount codes. Charge $199-$999/mo. Average DTC brand improves retention by 15-30%, worth $5k-$50k/mo to them.
top_opportunities.moat: 12+ months of customer purchase data creates increasingly accurate churn model; Shopify App Store distribution
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Shopify OAuth app; connect to Klaviyo API for email sending; create churn prediction model using customer purchase data
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI generates hyper-personalized win-back messages referencing specific past purchases — 'We noticed you loved the dark roast blend you ordered in November'

top_opportunities.title: Amazon Return Pallets → eBay/Facebook Marketplace Arbitrage Tracker
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a tool that monitors BULQ, Direct Liquidation, and B-Stock for return pallet manifests. Use LLM to read manifests, estimate resale value of each item using eBay sold listings data, calculate expected profit per pallet, and alert when margin exceeds 40%. Sell as $49/mo SaaS to liquidation resellers, or use it yourself to buy and flip $500-$2,000 pallets.
top_opportunities.moat: eBay sold listing database creates proprietary pricing model over time
top_opportunities.first_step: Scrape eBay completed listings for 100 common liquidation categories; build manifest parser using LLM; test with 1 real pallet purchase
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI reads messy manifest data (inconsistent product descriptions, condition notes) and maps to accurate market values — a task that takes resellers 3+ hours manually

top_opportunities.title: B2B Wholesale Product Sourcing AI Agent
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI agent that scrapes Alibaba, Faire, and Tundra for wholesale product listings, compares MOQ/pricing against Amazon and Shopify retail prices, and generates a weekly 'best margin opportunities' report for retail buyers. Sell as $199/mo subscription to boutique retailers and Amazon sellers who spend 5+ hours/week on sourcing research.
top_opportunities.moat: Price database grows over time; supplier relationship data becomes proprietary
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Alibaba scraper + Amazon price API comparison; create 'top 10 products this week' email newsletter as proof of concept
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI evaluates supplier credibility, flags red flags in product specs, and estimates true landed cost including tariffs — analysis that previously required a sourcing consultant
